scenario: Mastodon work session - audit the Status contract before a teardown rework

steps.name: Map the Status contract and what it is built on
Trace how a status is created and distributed
Audit every dependent of the Status contract
Trace how status identity and visibility are guarded
Assess the blast radius of the contract change
